# UI Rules

## Layout

- Use PageContainer
- Card based sections
- Avoid full-width content

## Hierarchy

- One primary CTA
- Strong title hierarchy
- Description must support CTA

## Spacing

- Use designTokens only
- Avoid arbitrary spacing

## States

- Loading must be visible
- Error must include text
- State cannot rely only on color

## Accessibility

- Keyboard accessible
- aria-label required
- Focus visible
